since_last: 71% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.55%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 71% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.81% · BTC +0.47% · Gold +0.15% · Nasdaq100 +1.32%. 71% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.55%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.55%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -0.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +7.29%, POWL +6.01%, BBAI +5.38%, AI +5.19%. Laggards: IBM -24.27%, ISRG -4.73%, CSCO -3.77%, DELL -3.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.35% at $137.92
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
